note: graphify 0.10.0 has NO supported flag to override community labels. Labels live in graph.json at graph.community_labels and are generated by the clustering step. Communities 7 and 8 received placeholder names. The values below are grounded in their member entities; a maintainer could set them via the clustering/label step or by editing graph.community_labels. This file is advisory only and is NOT consumed by any export command.

current_labels.0: Sherlock Holmes anthology and Red-Headed League
current_labels.3: A Study in Scarlet framing and home base

suggested.7: Dr. Thorndyke and The Red Thumb Mark
suggested.8: Arsene Lupin: the Queen's Necklace affair
